records.question: Which campuses that have related csu_fees, degrees, and faculty records have at least 4021 degrees, have the campus name exactly 'San Jose State University', and have the location exactly 'San Jose'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN faculty ON campuses.id = faculty.campus
WHERE degrees.degrees >= 4021 AND campuses.campus = 'San Jose State University' AND campuses.location = 'San Jose'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    Campuses.Id
FROM 
    Campuses
INNER JOIN 
    csu_fees ON Campuses.Id = csu_fees.Campus
INNER JOIN 
    degrees ON Campuses.Id = degrees.Campus
INNER JOIN 
    faculty ON Campuses.Id = faculty.Campus
WHERE 
    Campuses.Campus = 'San Jose State University'
    AND Campuses.Location = 'San Jose'
    AND degrees.Degrees >= 4021

records.question: Which campuses located in Turlock where the county is Stanislaus were established in 1957 and had exactly 395 undergraduate and at most 56 graduate enrollments in 2004, with campus fees of at least 1915 in or before 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE discipline_enrollments.graduate <= 56 AND campuses.location = 'Turlock' AND discipline_enrollments.undergraduate = 395 AND discipline_enrollments.year = 2004 AND campuses.year = 1957 AND csu_fees.year <= 1996 AND campuses.county = 'Stanislaus' AND csu_fees.campusfee >= 1915
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Id
FROM Campuses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.Id = e.Campus
JOIN csu_fees cf ON c.Id = cf.Campus
WHERE c.Location = 'Turlock'
  AND c.County = 'Stanislaus'
  AND c.Year = 1957
  AND e.Year = 2004
  AND e.TotalEnrollment_AY = 395 + e.Graduate
  AND e.Graduate <= 56
  AND cf.Year <= 1996
  AND cf.CampusFee >= 1915

records.question: Which campuses named California State University-Bakersfield have been established since 1965, have at least 22 disciplines, at most 514 undergraduate enrollments, no more than 0 graduate enrollments, total enrollment of at least 457, and fees data from 1996 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE discipline_enrollments.undergraduate <= 514 AND campuses.year >= 1965 AND discipline_enrollments.graduate <= 0 AND csu_fees.year >= 1996 AND campuses.campus = 'California State University-Bakersfield' AND enrollments.totalenrollment_ay >= 457 AND discipline_enrollments.discipline >= 22
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    c.Id
FROM 
    Campuses c
JOIN 
    degrees d ON c.Id = d.Campus
JOIN 
    discipline_enrollments de ON c.Id = de.Campus
JOIN 
    enrollments e ON c.Id = e.Campus
JOIN 
    csu_fees cf ON c.Id = cf.Campus
WHERE 
    c.Campus = 'California State University-Bakersfield'
    AND c.Year >= 1965
    AND d.Degrees >= 22
    AND de.Undergraduate <= 514
    AND de.Graduate = 0
    AND e.TotalEnrollment_AY >= 457
    AND cf.Year >= 1996

records.question: Which campuses that have related csu_fees, degrees, enrollments, and faculty records have faculty with year at most 2003 and are located in the county 'Los Angeles'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
JOIN faculty ON campuses.id = faculty.campus
WHERE faculty.year <= 2003 AND campuses.county = 'Los Angeles'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Id
FROM Campuses c
JOIN csu_fees cf ON c.Id = cf.Campus
JOIN degrees d ON c.Id = d.Campus
JOIN enrollments e ON c.Id = e.Campus
JOIN faculty f ON c.Id = f.Campus
WHERE c.County = 'Los Angeles'
  AND f.Year <= 2003

WHERE csu_fees.year = 1996 AND degrees.degrees >= 2368 AND csu_fees.campusfee <= 1751 AND campuses.year >= 1947 AND campuses.location = 'Los Angeles' AND enrollments.fte_ay >= 4713 AND campuses.county = 'Los Angeles' AND enrollments.year = 1956
